trending_themes.evidence: S.Coups confirmed members will enlist before end of 2026; group enters hiatus until 2028 reunion. Sparked disbandment fears among CARAT fandom.
The 8 & Vernon sub-unit debut announced for June 29, 2026 with Goyang and Hong Kong performances.
Achieved 300M+ streams with 'Super'; 'LOVE, MONEY, FAME' joined billion-stream catalog; 19 songs total above 1B streams.

annotation_hooks: Bittersweet hiatus sentiment: '13th member' (CARAT) loyalty narrative challenged by enlistment reality — parallels BTS ARMY waiting through military service
LOVE, MONEY, FAME joining billion-stream tier validates decade of work even as group pauses
V8 sub-unit creative opportunity during pause mirrors J-Hope solo activities during BTS hiatus
raw_headlines: S.Coups Confirms Members Enlistment SEVENTEEN Hiatus Until 2028
